radio_buttons.description: Radio button group component for selecting subscription plans on the Optimus screen. Contains the list of subscription plan options, their visual styling, and interaction behavior. Supports two layout styles: 'tiers_style' for tiered half-screen layout and default full-width layout.

indicator_alignment.description: Controls the position of the radio button selection indicator (dot/circle). Possible values: 'left' places the indicator on the left side of the button (default); 'right' places it on the right side; 'none' hides the indicator entirely.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler internal stability bitmask. Auto-generated field; not intended for manual configuration.

buttons.description: Array of radio button items representing available subscription plans. Each button maps to a subscription package and displays pricing, trial info, and promotional badges. Users select one option to choose their subscription plan.

badge.description: Badge configuration displayed on the radio button, typically as a small label indicating promotional information like 'BEST VALUE' or 'SAVE 50%'. Supports dynamic styling based on parent radio button selection state.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler internal stability bitmask. Auto-generated field; not intended for manual configuration.

color.description: Background or gradient color of the badge. Specified as a hex color string (e.g., '#FFD700'). Also used to derive the badge gradient styling.

deselected_text_color.description: Text color of the badge when the parent radio button is in the deselected state. Specified as a hex color string. Only applies when hide_on_deselected_state is false.

deselected_bg_color.description: Background color of the badge when the parent radio button is in the deselected state. Specified as a hex color string. Only applies when hide_on_deselected_state is false.

variant.description: Badge design variant that controls the visual style. 'v3' uses the modern badge design with updated styling; any other value or empty string uses the legacy badge design.

hide_on_deselected_state.description: Controls badge visibility based on parent radio button selection state. When true, the badge is hidden when the radio button is deselected and only shown when selected. When false, the badge remains visible in both states.

text.description: Display text shown inside the badge label, typically promotional text such as 'BEST VALUE', 'SAVE 50%', or 'POPULAR'.

selected_bg_color.description: Background color of the radio button when it is in the selected state. Specified as a hex color string (e.g., '#FFFFFF').

disabled_text_color.description: Text color of the radio button when it is in the deselected/unselected state. Specified as a hex color string (e.g., '#999999').

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler internal stability bitmask. Auto-generated field; not intended for manual configuration.

selected_border_color.description: Border color of the radio button when it is in the selected state. Specified as a hex color string (e.g., '#7C3AED').

is_selected.description: Determines whether this radio button is selected by default when the subscription screen is first displayed. Exactly one button in the list should have this set to true.

is_enlarged_button_component.description: When true, renders the radio button using an enlarged layout with more prominent styling and additional space for content. When false or null, uses the standard compact radio button layout.

id.description: Unique identifier for this radio button item, used as a lookup key to associate with a subscription package (package ID) and its detailed button configuration (CTA, pricing text, colors).

disabled_background_color.description: Background color of the radio button when it is in the deselected/unselected state. Specified as a hex color string (e.g., '#F0F0F0').

border_color.description: Border color of the radio button when it is in the deselected/unselected state. Specified as a hex color string (e.g., '#E0E0E0').

gradient_type.description: Gradient style applied to the radio button background or badge. Known values: 'gold' applies a gold gradient background; 'plus' and 'pro' map to specific tier icon badges (user_plus, user_pro drawables); other values are resolved through the CascadeGradients system.

purchase_on_select.description: When true, selecting a radio button immediately triggers the purchase flow without requiring an additional CTA button tap. When false, users must tap the radio button to select a plan and then tap a separate CTA button to initiate purchase.

type.description: Determines the visual style and layout of the radio buttons. Possible values: 'tiers_style' renders a tiered half-screen radio button layout (OptimusHalfRadioButtonComponent); any other value (e.g., 'default') renders the standard full-width radio button layout (SubscriptionRadioButtonComponent).

trial_reminder_toggle.description: Toggle component that allows users to opt in or out of free trial reminder notifications before the trial period ends and billing begins. Each toggle state maps to a different subscription package variant.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the trial reminder toggle is visible on the subscription screen. When false or null, the toggle is hidden.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler internal stability bitmask. Auto-generated field; not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Unique identifier used to look up the trial reminder toggle's detailed configuration (enabled/disabled states, package IDs, text, colors) from remote configuration.

toggle_placeholder_text.description: Placeholder text component displayed near the toggle area on the subscription screen, providing contextual information or instructions related to the toggle switches (e.g., explaining what enabling the toggle does).

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the toggle placeholder text is visible on the subscription screen. When false or null, the placeholder text is hidden.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler internal stability bitmask. Auto-generated field; not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Unique identifier used to look up the toggle placeholder text component's detailed configuration (text content and color) from remote configuration.

content_id.description: Unique identifier for the screen variant configuration. Used as a lookup key in the screen configuration array to determine which screen layout to render. If the requested content_id is not found, the system falls back to the screen with content_id 'default'.

footer.description: Footer component that displays content at the bottom of the subscription screen, such as legal text, terms of service links, or additional information. Reserved component defined in the schema for configuration flexibility.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the footer component is visible on the subscription screen. When false or null, the footer section is hidden.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler internal stability bitmask. Auto-generated field; not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Unique identifier used to look up the footer component's detailed configuration from remote configuration.

banner.description: Banner media component that displays promotional images or videos on the subscription screen. Supports multiple banner values with image URLs, action links, and placeholder images. The banner type determines rendering behavior (e.g., static image, carousel).

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the banner component is visible on the subscription screen. When false or null, the banner area is hidden.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler internal stability bitmask. Auto-generated field; not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Unique identifier used to look up the banner's detailed configuration (type, image URLs, actions, placeholders) from remote configuration.

description.description: Description text component that displays additional descriptive content on the subscription screen, such as feature details or offer explanations. Reserved component defined in the schema for configuration flexibility.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the description component is visible on the subscription screen. When false or null, the description section is hidden.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler internal stability bitmask. Auto-generated field; not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Unique identifier used to look up the description component's detailed configuration from remote configuration.

title.description: Title component that displays the main heading text on the subscription offer screen, with configurable text content and color.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the title component is visible on the subscription screen. When false or null, the title section is hidden.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler internal stability bitmask. Auto-generated field; not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Unique identifier used to look up the title component's detailed configuration (title text, subtitle text, colors) from remote configuration.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler internal stability bitmask. Auto-generated field; not intended for manual configuration.

close_button.description: Close/dismiss button component displayed on the subscription screen, allowing users to close the subscription offer. Supports configurable alignment, margins, and custom icon URL.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the close button is visible on the subscription screen. When false or null, the close button is hidden and users cannot dismiss the screen via the close button.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler internal stability bitmask. Auto-generated field; not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Unique identifier used to look up the close button's detailed configuration (visibility, alignment, margins, custom icon URL) from remote configuration.

subtitle.description: Subtitle component that displays secondary heading text beneath the title on the subscription offer screen, with configurable text content and color.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the subtitle component is visible on the subscription screen. When false or null, the subtitle is hidden.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler internal stability bitmask. Auto-generated field; not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Unique identifier used to look up the subtitle component's detailed configuration (text content and color) from remote configuration.

banner_placeholder.description: Banner placeholder component that displays promotional text with an optional badge icon and shadow effect above the main banner area on the subscription screen.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the banner placeholder component is visible on the subscription screen. When false or null, the banner placeholder is hidden.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler internal stability bitmask. Auto-generated field used by the Compose runtime to track parameter stability; not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Unique identifier used to look up the banner placeholder component's detailed configuration (text, badge URL, shadow settings) from remote configuration.

secondary_button.description: Secondary action button component displayed on the subscription screen, typically used for alternative actions such as 'Restore Purchase' or navigating to a different touchpoint. Configured with text, color, action type, and optional touchpoint identifier.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the secondary button is visible on the subscription screen. When false or null, the secondary button is hidden.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler internal stability bitmask. Auto-generated field; not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Unique identifier used to look up the secondary button's detailed configuration (text, color, action, touchpoint) from remote configuration.

logo.description: Logo image component displayed on the subscription offer screen, typically showing the Picsart brand logo or a subscription tier logo (e.g., Gold, Plus, Pro).

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the logo component is visible on the subscription screen. When false or null, the logo is hidden.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler internal stability bitmask. Auto-generated field; not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Unique identifier used to look up the logo component's detailed configuration (image URL or resource reference) from remote configuration.

switch_package_toggle.description: Toggle component that allows users to switch between different subscription package sets (e.g., monthly vs. yearly plans). Each toggle state has its own configuration with title, subtitle, description, associated package ID, text color, and accent color.

is_enabled.description: Controls whether the switch package toggle is visible on the subscription screen. When false or null, the toggle is hidden.

$stable.description: Kotlin Compose compiler internal stability bitmask. Auto-generated field; not intended for manual configuration.

id.description: Unique identifier used to look up the switch package toggle's detailed configuration (enabled/disabled states, package IDs, text, colors) from remote configuration.
